message:
web: Fix Read tool rendering for partial file reads

- Show line range (startLine:endLine) in muted colors for partial reads
- Render correct line numbers starting from startLine instead of 1
- Use PatchDiff with context lines for offset rendering in FileViewer

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ds4w8mg7o9m0nwsymul3k2sy
